import math
from source import sqrt

def test_sqrt_convergence_check():
    """The loop should converge to the true square root; the buggy convergence check
    causes the algorithm to stop too early, returning 1.5 for sqrt(2) with epsilon 0.1."""
    result = sqrt(2, 0.1)
    expected = 1.4167  # approx sqrt(2) rounded to 4 decimal places
    assert math.isclose(result, expected, rel_tol=1e-3), (
        f"sqrt(2, 0.1) returned {result!r} instead of approximately {expected}"
    )
